creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text:
Created attachment 162996
Error log as displayed on UI page

With "geoserver_enabled="YES" in /etc/rc.conf the page related to UI link "Server status" throws error (error attached).
The interesting part is if I stop then start the service again the error goes away. It did like that for me on the first run (after boot) all the times I tested (tested it 6 times).

Hardware: VirtualBox VM
FreeBSD branch: 10.2-RELEASE
Access type: Not proxied (e.g. http://10.10.1.161:8080/geoserver )

Cheers,
Rodrigo
